meta.title: Tech Talk: R3 Labs
meta.product: Corda Protocol / R3 Labs Real World Asset Marketplace

transcript: Hi everybody. Yep, so I'm Richard Brown, I'm CEO at R3 Labs. Now, don't lynch me, but we're the firm who invented the private permissioned blockchain. So over 10 years, we've built dozens of live networks, we've got tens of billions of dollars of assets issued across them. But there really is only so far you can take that model. So yes, we've got these dozens of live networks, billions of assets, most of the world's largest financial institutions are using our technology, they're transacting across these Corda networks. These banks, these financial institutions are also our shareholders. So in the TradFi world, the Corda ecosystem, the R3 ecosystem, like it really is a big deal. But there's only so far you can take this. There's only so far you can take these private networks. So, as soon as the regulatory affordances, as soon as the regulation allowed, we were looking as fast as we could to figure out which of the permissionless networks could we wholeheartedly align to. Back then, I was CTO, so I led the work that analyzed these networks and concluded wholeheartedly and decisively that the network we should align to and converge to was the Solana network. And, you know what, six months in, we made the right choice. It's just like so obviously the right choice then and it's so obviously the right choice now. So, I'm going to talk about three things super quickly. Very, very quickly, what were some of the reasons why we, as representatives if you like of TradFi or of Wall Street, why did we select the Solana architecture? What was it that stood out to us? Number one, I'll do that super quickly. Second thing is the Internet Capital Markets. It sounds like a meme, I suspect there are probably people in the technical stage rolling their eyes when this supposed marketing phrase is uttered, but I think there is a genuine technical underpinning to that which I want to articulate. But there's also a key missing piece, which is a real world asset marketplace that is preventing the full success and the full rollout of the Internet Capital Markets on Solana, and I'm going to talk about that. And then I'll announce what R3 Labs is launching at the start of next year to fill that gap. So, already too slow, so I'm not going to talk about the technical case for Solana, you can read my blog post on that. Except to say, the underlying architecture, the way that the transactions are processed in parallel by each transaction committing to the part of the ledger it touches, it seems so simple, but obviously to everybody in this room, it's the reason why the transactions can be processed in parallel. The EVM can't do that, SVM can do that. It's absolutely critical to being a compelling and credible target for Wall Street to move its transactions to. So when we're out there talking about Solana, we shouldn't hide or be shy to talk about its architecture. It really is a really quite clever design that can't be replicated by the EVM ecosystem. Also don't have time to talk about what we're doing to bring all these live Corda networks over to Solana. Except to say, again, starting next year, there will be a live Rust program that is able to process Corda transactions, so R3 transactions, live on Solana Mainnet, providing consensus to any of the existing private Corda networks that wish to opt into that, that will also allow them to bridge their assets over. What I want to talk about instead is the Internet Capital Markets and how I think we can be better at explaining what we on the Solana side are doing to traditional finance. Because when I say capital markets to a regular traditional finance person, this is the kind of thing they think about. So this is just a tiny diagram of one tiny part of the traditional capital markets, how shares are bought and sold and how they move across. So when we talk about things like looping and decentralized lending protocols and AMMs, they're kind of like their eyes glaze over and they wonder why we're so excited about what we're doing. But it's not because those terms are wrong or mad, it's because a lot of what we're doing has already been done by TradFi, it's just been done on a very isolated and disparate scale. So we say collateralized lending pools, they think repo. We might say yield boost with looping, they think securities lending. So these features of DeFi, specifically Solana DeFi, that are so powerful, it's not them individually that are so powerful. What it is is that they're all in one place. So back to the technical case for Solana, the fact that there is a single high performance, high bandwidth, low latency, relentlessly high performance single shared substrate, single shared layer 1. It's an unbelievable killer feature of the Solana platform because all these different things, whether it's the lending pools, the DEXs, the looping, all these different features, many of which exist in isolation in TradFi, are all in one place, endlessly composable. That's the killer feature and that's what I think enables the Internet Capital Markets to be built specifically and exclusively on Solana. But there's a missing piece, and I guess this is like the key part of my talk, which is it's fine to have these on-chain capabilities, it's fine to have on-chain self-referential yield if you like. But it's only when we can bring a huge amount of real world assets, real cash flows originating from real activity in the real world, it's only when the full power of the capital markets can converge. But right now, if I look at what's actually been achieved with real world assets so far, there's so much further we can go. It's almost as if there's kind of like an impedance mismatch. There's all these assets that could be brought on chain, whether they're bonds or equities or funds or whatever they are, but just because they can be brought on chain doesn't mean anybody on chain will actually want to buy them. And that's perhaps not surprising. If you, if those of us in this room who've lived on this ecosystem, we're used to better. We're used to what the on-chain markets can provide. We're used to being able to access things, access assets anywhere in the world in any ticket size with instant liquidity even if the underlying asset is illiquid, with yield that is actually commensurate with the risk we're taking. But there's an impedance mismatch, that's typically not what's being supplied. Now of course that's also a solved problem. That problem was solved in the traditional financial markets by a little technology invented depending on who you ask maybe 101 years ago, the mutual fund. That's the solution to this problem. You've got some assets that aren't quite right for what the investors want, you package them up in the mutual fund world in a legal structure with perhaps a layer of liquidity or a layer of structuring so that what pops out the other side is exactly what the investor wants. But it's slow, it's clunky, it's a centuries-old technology, it's expensive, and it doesn't do a good job particularly for anybody. But there is a solution, there's a direct parallel in DeFi. It's the Yield Vault. It's an on-chain contract, very cheap, very quick, very easy to write, that does exactly the same thing but permissionlessly on a network, on a permissionless network. Can own the underlying assets and then with a curator, think of it as a fund manager, they can then mix the assets in the right form with the right liquidity, with the right liquidation profile for the underlying investor. So that's the missing piece if you like. That's the way to bridge this impedance mismatch. So this isn't a technical problem, this isn't a software engineering problem, if you like it's a financial engineering problem. If we could somehow transform the assets from what are being supplied off-chain into what's demanded on-chain, suddenly we can unlock explosive growth in the availability of real world assets and hence complete those Internet Capital Markets. Move it from being say something of a marketing term to being something that is a genuine description of what can be achieved and can be achieved solely on Solana going back to that point of it being a single shared massively performant substrate rather than a collection of satellite L2s and private networks. So, that's what R3 is bringing to market. So R3 Labs, early next year, will be launching the Real World Asset Marketplace for Solana. A single unified place where off-chain traditional issuers can issue their assets in a way that will guarantee, can't guarantee, in a way that will give them distribution directly into these on-chain vaults that are curated by a collection of high quality curators who can turn these assets into a form that the on-chain investors actually want to and actually can buy and importantly can then connect directly into the DeFi ecosystem. So that bridging of the world, giving the asset issuers what they want which is distribution in the right form to what the people on-chain want which is assets that actually meet their needs with the right access profile, the right liquidity profile, and the right yield. It sounds so simple, it sounds so easy because it has been achieved to some extent albeit very imperfectly on the traditional side. What we're doing is bringing it onto Solana to be the on-chain Real World Asset Marketplace. So there's a lot more to talk about. If you want to be one of the first to give this a try, make sure you register at corda.xyz or go to, enter your Solflare quest code there. But just to finish, Real World Asset Marketplace can only be done on Solana because of Solana's unique architecture. We chose Solana as the representative of a huge amount of TradFi for a reason, and I haven't regretted that choice once. So thanks very much for your time and I'll speak to anyone afterwards. Thank you.

sources.title: Plume Brings Institutional Real-World Yield to Solana With Launch of RWA Nest Vaults

Plume Brings Institutional Real-World Yield to Solana With Launch of RWA Nest Vaults[Accessibility Statement](https://www.cision.com/about/accessibility/)[Skip Navigation](#main)
# Plume Brings Institutional Real-World Yield to Solana With Launch of RWA Nest Vaults
[![Plume Network Logo (PRNewsfoto/Plume Network)]( "Plume Network Logo (PRNewsfoto/Plume Network)")](#)
## News provided by
[**Plume Network**](https://www.prnewswire.com/news/plume-network/)
Dec 05, 2025, 09:15 ET

*Nest vaults with assets from WisdomTree, Hamilton Lane, BlackOpal and issuers including Securitize and SuperState mark the beginning of a new yield economy forSolana.*
NEW YORK,Dec. 5, 2025/PRNewswire/ --[Plume](https://edge.prnewswire.com/c/link/?t=0&l=en&o=4573545-1&h=1349188964&u=https://plume.org/&a=Plume), the leading RWA blockchain powering real-world yield, today announced the launch of five RWA Nest vaults onSolana, setting real-world yield as a new base layer for the ecosystem and marking an important first step in Plume's multichain expansion for Nest.
Launching the vaults natively onSolanagives users direct investment opportunities to institutional-grade assets from WisdomTree, Hamilton Lane, BlackOpal, and issuers including Securitize and SuperState.Solanausers can natively access onchain credit, treasuries, and short-term receivables and the ability to earn institutional-grade real-world yield.
With the launch of nBASIS, nOPAL, nWISDOM, nALPHA and nTBILL Vaults,Solana's 20+ million users can soon deposit stablecoins natively into Nest to unlock reliable, stable, real-world APY. Each deposit returns a Nest vaulttoken, a liquid, yield-bearing asset that accrues value over time and can move seamlessly acrossSolanaDeFi, from DEX liquidity pools to lending and structured products, with the ability to redeem at any point.
As part of this integration, Plume is also launching a deep partnership with[Squads Lab](https://edge.prnewswire.com/c/link/?t=0&l=en&o=4573545-1&h=2271106279&u=https://squads.xyz/&a=Squads+Lab),Solana's leading multi-sig and treasury management infrastructure provider. Plume will introduce its RWA yield pipelines across the Squads ecosystem, including a bespoke vault integrated for Altitude users and seamless RWA yield access for developers building with Grid.
*"Cryptois moving past the era of synthetic yield and into a market grounded in real economics. Stablecoins brought millions intocrypto, but yieldcoins will keep them here. This integration withSolanais the next step in building a transparent, programmable financial system at scale."*said Teddy Pornprinya, Co-Founder and CBO at Plume.
*"Plume already anchors over half of the industry's RWA activity, andSolanahas become one of the most efficient, high-throughput environments incrypto, making it a natural home for onchain credit, treasuries, and short-term receivables. Bringing our strengths together is how we unlock the next phase of onchain finan*ce".
By introducing institutional RWAs at scale, Plume is expanding theSolanaDeFiecosystem with sustainable, composable yield infrastructure that can underpin the next generation ofSolana-native financial applications.
Solanausers can instantly access boosted yield opportunities with Nest.
The Plume Nest Points Program is a rewards framework designed to turn participation into ownership. Users can earn Plume Nest Points by holding and using Nest vault tokens. The more users hold and deploy, the more they earn as part of the Season One program.
Solanausers will also soon unlock boosted yield opportunities with direct access to lending markets on Loopscale. These platform integrations allow leverage

# Figure and Leading Crypto Partners Launch RWA Consortium for Onchain Finance on Solana
December 04, 2025 09:00 ET| Source:[Figure Technology Solutions, Inc.](https://www.globenewswire.com/en/search/organization/FT%20Intermediate%CE%B4%20Inc%C2%A7)FollowFigure Technology Solutions, Inc.
Share
* * * * * * * * ![Figure and Leading Crypto Partners Launch RWA Consortium for Onchain Finance on Solana](https://ml.globenewswire.com/Resource/Download/38b97e43-d99f-4a08-9e38-3577453d7f24/rwa-consortium.png)[](#)
*New coalition advances Figure’s vision of moving capital markets to blockchain, expands real-world yield to Solana, and sets the standard for RWA collaboration across chains*
SAN FRANCISCO, Dec. 04, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) --[Figure Technology Solutions, Inc.](https://www.globenewswire.com/Tracker?data=sVrR0nCGbyoSGqLpmp3W226XOcDwCfx8V3EteYCwLGxXEo0igM8ivJlwMreqY9enDApKlqpkq2h9LGXlpppDneFNwYs_wf55flepAb6tunwEmh-xksGmM2ldyKQcRF4H)(“Figure”)(Nasdaq: FIGR), the leading blockchain-native capital marketplace for the origination, funding, sale, and trading of on-chain loan products and tokenized real-world assets (RWAs), today announced the launch of an RWA consortium, a landmark coalition that will expand access to Figure's more than $1 billion in monthly on-chain loan originations, starting on Solana. The consortium represents a coordinated effort by leading crypto platforms to support and drive adoption of PRIME, the liquid staking token built on the[Hastra liquidity protocol](https://www.globenewswire.com/Tracker?data=4qB14oW0HW3wV6G7eIeftmMVA8az3rMOK8PAa0Y2-BRXRv-AIPxXC8jou5QwqZswqZL167DOJEXxgNXklTx7X5zNuk4nN-6TXUv6pOrCjxitPRgZlNKhBddz_5Xu1T9Hu1XH4kRiKqkttkiJeicO8MN-CNu8gmEyyquNATcxaPNC56uSFgFkmxuV7i1s-QvGo4s2-XxOi1gshATrL0nmDL5c78zLpeU5MWvBvHd1TKM=), developed in partnership with Figure and the Provenance Blockchain Foundation. PRIME is powered by the Democratized Prime decentralized lending protocol on the Provenance Blockchain, which allows users to lend against pools of tokenized Figure RWA loans. Through this coalition, everyday DeFi users can now access institutional-grade yields previously reserved for banks and accredited investors.
The RWA Consortium builds on Figure’s vision to bring capital markets on-chain, a goal most recently reinforced during its IPO and the expansion of its RWA ecosystem across multiple blockchains. By extending beyond the Provenance Blockchain to integrate with Layer 1 networks like Solana, Figure is partnering with Hastra to leverage Chainlink[CCIP](https://www.globenewswire.com/Tracker?data=AoAEgzHaPbSD8H81yfVKVDXA32VlG1HlMnUL10_xbh1thIeREQF8WzIHuEqW8sPg7s78VxMYQfWySLEd-xz4Tg==)to power the cross-chain interoperability needed for a connected, multi-chain finance ecosystem. With over $19 billion in on-chain loan originations to date and a[70% market share](https://www.globenewswire.com/Tracker?data=_8YSDjYvrN99A8tUsqQH01Y3JxsV6a895BAreWpCDDEb82mue5e6XzzI_TsT7oYru-CPY3g5Xe0uEA769WrIxfR1KhHLCDiIcXYiXdT8nwu4hb9Amh8nUkhSFupuvO2d)in the RWA private credit, Figure is uniquely positioned to bridge traditional credit markets with DeFi.
This initiative follows the recent debut of Hastra, a liquidity protocol incubated by Figure and Provenance Blockchain that allows the yields generated in Democratized Prime to reach decentralized finance, with all Hastra yield products secured by the Chainlink data standard. Hastra acts as a

tags.impact_reason: R3 Labs, a significant player in TradFi with the Corda protocol, is building an RWA marketplace on Solana, signaling institutional interest and a potential influx of traditional assets.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a monumental bank vault as the Semantic Anchor because it's the ultimate symbol of Traditional Finance ('TradFi'), representing the secure but closed, permissioned world of R3's Corda protocol. The core story is the pivot to an open system (Solana), so the visual shows this vault cracking open to reveal a vibrant, digital network within. For the homepage text, I integrated a glowing, holographic '$60T' inside the vault to represent the immense potential of the Real World Asset (RWA) market being unlocked by this new 'Internet Capital Markets,' making the abstract concept of value tangible and futuristic.
visual_idea.description: A monumental, circular bank vault door, crafted from brushed steel with intricate brass locking mechanisms, stands slightly ajar in a dark, cavernous marble hall. From the crack, a brilliant, high-energy light in Solana's cyan and magenta palette spills out, casting long, dramatic shadows. Peeking through the gap, instead of gold, is a swirling, infinite network of holographic data streams. Floating diegetically within this digital nexus are the glowing neon characters '$60T', signifying the untapped value of the new marketplace. The background is deep and dark, emphasizing the vault as a portal from an old world to a new one.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A monumental, towering circular bank vault door, meticulously crafted from brushed steel with highly intricate brass locking mechanisms, stands slightly ajar. It dominates the lower and middle sections of a vast, cavernous marble hall, extending upwards with significant negative space above, emphasizing epic scale. From the narrow crack in the vault door, a brilliant, high-energy light in Solana's vibrant cyan and magenta palette powerfully spills out, casting long, dramatic, and stark chiaroscuro shadows across the dark, textured marble surfaces of the hall. Peeking through the radiant gap, instead of traditional gold, is a swirling, infinite network of intricate holographic data streams. Floating diegetically and luminously within this digital nexus are the glowing neon characters '$60T', signifying the untapped value of a new marketplace. The background recedes into deep, profound darkness, emphasizing the vault as a majestic portal from an old, shadowed world to a new, luminous one. This scene is rendered with hyperreal detail, cinematic contrast, volumetric lighting, and realistic materials, creating an intense and mysterious atmosphere. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, photorealistic, Unreal Engine 5, 3:4 aspect ratio.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a monumental bank vault as the Semantic Anchor because it's the ultimate symbol of Traditional Finance ('TradFi'), representing the secure but closed, permissioned world of R3's Corda protocol. The core story is the pivot to an open system (Solana), so the visual shows this vault cracking open to reveal a vibrant, digital network within. For the homepage text, I integrated a glowing, holographic '$60T' inside the vault to represent the immense potential of the Real World Asset (RWA) market being unlocked by this new 'Internet Capital Markets,' making the abstract concept of value tangible and futuristic.
visual_idea.description: A macro shot focusing on the point of contact where the heavy, brushed-steel vault door meets its frame. The intricate brass gears of the locking mechanism are visible, reflecting a brilliant burst of cyan and magenta light that erupts from the narrow opening. The image captures the textural contrast between the cold, solid metal of the old financial system and the energetic, ethereal light of the new Solana-powered digital network glimpsed just beyond the breach. No text is visible in this version.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A macro shot focusing on the precise point of contact where a heavy, weathered brushed-steel vault door meets its robust frame. The brushed-steel surface is intricately detailed with microscopic scratches and a subtle, dark sheen, emphasizing its cold, solid, industrial nature. Through the narrow, barely-breached opening, an intricate arrangement of polished brass gears from the locking mechanism is visible, reflecting an explosive, brilliant burst of cyan and magenta light that erupts from the void beyond. This light manifests as energetic, ethereal holographic data streams, symbolizing the new Solana-powered digital network. The image captures a dramatic textural contrast between the dense, immovable metal of the old financial system and the vibrant, digital luminescence of the emerging network glimpsed just beyond the breach. No text is visible in this version. The composition is a perfectly symmetrical, centrally focused, tight macro frame, filling the entire 1:1 aspect ratio with immense detail and texture. Dramatic chiaroscuro lighting casts deep, moody shadows over the vault door, enhancing its form and emphasizing the intense play of light and shadow with strong cinematic contrast. Volumetric lighting emanates from the portal-like opening, creating a sense of depth and mystery. Shallow depth of field with a subtle, realistic lens bokeh effect on the farthest elements of the brass gears. Hyperrealistic, photorealistic, 8K ultra-detailed, octane render, raytracing, HDR, deep blacks.

editorial.headline: TradFi Giant R3 Labs Pivots to Solana for RWA Marketplace
editorial.standfirst: The architect of the private banking ledger admits the permissioned model has hit a ceiling, selecting the SVM to power a unified 'Internet Capital Markets.'
key_takeaways: **R3 Labs** will launch a **Real World Asset Marketplace** on **Solana** in early 2026, utilizing 'Yield Vaults' to package institutional assets for DeFi liquidity.
A new **Rust** verifier will allow **Solana Mainnet** to provide consensus for private **Corda** networks, creating a direct bridge for billions in bank assets.
CEO **Richard Brown** explicitly rejected the **EVM** in favor of **Solana**'s parallel processing architecture, citing it as the only viable substrate for Wall Street scale.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
The 'private vs. public' blockchain dichotomy effectively collapsed today as **R3 Labs**, the firm behind the enterprise-grade **Corda** protocol, announced a decisive strategic alignment with **Solana**. CEO **Richard Brown**—who helped invent the private permissioned blockchain model—admitted that while private ledgers have secured billions in assets, they have reached the limits of their utility. Following a six-month technical audit, **R3** concluded that the **EVM** lacks the architectural capacity for global capital markets, identifying **Solana**'s parallelized **SVM** as the only public network capable of handling institutional throughput.

To operationalize this pivot, **R3** is launching the **Real World Asset Marketplace** in early 2026. **Brown** argued that the current RWA sector suffers from a fundamental "impedance mismatch": raw off-chain assets (like bonds or equity) are often incompatible with the liquidity and risk profiles demanded by on-chain investors. The new marketplace will utilize "Yield Vaults"—permissionless smart contracts that function similarly to mutual funds—to restructure these assets. This allows high-quality curators to package traditional financial products into liquid, yield-bearing instruments that are natively composable within **Solana**'s DeFi ecosystem.

Crucially, this integration goes deeper than a simple application layer. **R3** is deploying a **Rust** program to **Solana Mainnet** capable of processing **Corda** transactions. This mechanism effectively allows **Solana** to serve as the consensus layer for existing private banking networks, enabling a seamless, trustless bridge for assets to migrate from **Corda**'s private ledgers to the public chain. By connecting TradFi's originated assets directly to **Solana**'s high-velocity liquidity, **R3** is moving beyond marketing rhetoric to build the actual infrastructure for the "Internet Capital Markets."
